name: Content Feedback
about: Flag content that misses, frames poorly, or could be improved
title: '[CONTENT] '
labels: content-feedback
assignees: ''
---

## Skill and section

<!-- Which skill and which file? E.g., autism-self-coach / references/masking-and-unmasking.md -->

**Skill:**
**File / section:**

## What's the issue

<!-- Specific quote or paraphrase of the content you're flagging. The more specific, the easier to act on. -->

## Why it misses

<!-- What's wrong with the current content? Wrong framing? Outdated language? Doesn't match real experience? Missing context? -->

## What would land better

<!-- If you have a suggested replacement or revision, share it. Even a rough draft helps. If you don't have a suggestion, that's fine too — just describing the problem is valuable. -->

## Your perspective

<!-- Optional. Helps us calibrate. Not required. You can stay anonymous.

Examples:
- Autistic adult, late-diagnosed
- Parent of an autistic child
- OT working with autistic kids
- SLP, neurodiversity-affirming
- Researcher in [field]
- Educator
- Multiple of the above

You don't need credentials to give feedback. Lived experience is valid expertise.
-->

## Anything else

<!-- Optional. Anything else we should know? -->
